description_long: This doll features a stylized human figure with a large, round head and a tall, cylindrical top hat with a light blue band. The face is painted with expressive features, including a frown, a mustache, and a single teardrop under one eye, giving it a somber or sad appearance. The doll is dressed in a blue coat with black buttons and a white trim, and its arms are slightly outstretched, with one arm longer than the other. The legs are asymmetrical, with one leg colored purple and the other matching the coat. The back of the head is decorated with vertical brown lines, suggesting hair texture. The overall design is whimsical and cartoonish, with a matte finish and simple color palette.
description: A whimsical doll with a tall top hat, blue coat, expressive painted face, and asymmetrical limbs, featuring a somber expression and stylized hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's expressive face, tall hat, blue coat with buttons, and asymmetrical arms and legs.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the back of the head with brown hair lines and the side profile of the hat and coat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full back of the head with vertical hair lines, the back of the blue coat, and both legs.
description_view_3: Left side view shows the side of the hat, coat, and the purple leg, with the hair lines visible on the head.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a Victorian-inspired blue coat with black buttons and white trim, paired with mismatched legs—one in purple and one in blue. The style is reminiscent of classic storybook or circus attire, with a tall black top hat featuring a light blue band.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head facing forward, right arm extended outward and left arm bent downward, and legs positioned close together but asymmetrical in length.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a frowning expression with downturned mouth, arched eyebrows, and a single teardrop under the right eye, conveying sadness.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight brown hair depicted as vertical painted lines on the back and sides of the head.
